title: Esoes Vacuum Storage Bags, 240x120cm Extra Large Vacuum Bags for Storage Mattresses, Duvets, and More - Waterproof, Sealable with Zipper, Reusable, No Vacuum Pump
features: 【85% Compression Ratio】:Compress your foam or latex mattress with vacuum seal technology to the thin size. This makes moving and returning it super easy! Have this Mattress Vacuum bag, you can save on moving costs by not having to rent a truck to move the mattress or duvets.

【Leakproof & Sealable】: With a double zip seal, this oversized vacuum bags ensures a great sealable effect, protecting your mattress or duvets against moisture, dust, water, mould,moths and stale smell.

【Reusable】:The jumbo vacuum storage bags adopts extra thick & durable premium grade PA+PE material, tough which is rip & tear resistant, tough, can be reusable.It will not break and leak with long-lasting compression.This will save you a bunch of money in the long run.

【Easy to Use】: The mattress vacuum seal bag is simple to operate and easy to seal, vacuum, roll up and tie. It takes only a few minutes for one person to compact with a regular universal vacuum cleaner. Rolled up vacuumed mattress easily fits in a car/back of SUV/shipping box, save more space. This makes moving and returning it super easy!

【Large Size】:Extra Large Size: 240*120cm/94.5X47.2inch; Large enough mattress vacuum storage bag, suitable for storage single, double bed mattress, dovets. camping sleeping bags etc. Notices: Not include Vacuum Pump;
description: Product Description The ULTIMATE storage solution ! Watertight valves and high-quality double zips protect your belongings and give you peace of mind. These vacuum bedding storage bags keep unwanted odours, moisture and dust out of clothes, fabrics and other items, keeping them as fresh and clean as when they were first packed! Suitable for all types of hoover! Choice of different sizes Esoes vacuum storage bags can help you reduce the size of your mattress, bedding, duvet, hoodie or large stuffed animal by up to 85%. Please note: 1. Use the clip to seal the zip from front to back 3 to 4 times. 2. Open the white turbo valve cover and use a hoover to suck out the air. Please do not remove the pink air cushion. 3. Close the blue cover immediately after pumping. 4. Make sure that the zip and the blue lid are completely sealed and that the vacuum bag does not leak.
